---
title: "OMR Report"
author: "Katie"
date: '2026-7-13'
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
# Load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggpubr)
library(cder)
library(zoo)
```
# Chipps figure
```{r}
#data provided by Jonathan Speegle

chipps <- read.csv("LongfinSmelt/Data/Chipps Island_LFS_Oct2025-Jun2026.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
chipps$SampleDate<-mdy(chipps$SampleDate)

#filter to >60mm
chipps.ad <- filter(chipps, ForkLength >= 60)

#plot catch over time
ggplot(data=chipps.ad, aes(x=SampleDate, y=SumOfCount)) +
    geom_bar(stat="identity") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("LFS Catch") +
    xlab("Month") +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b")

ggsave("LongfinSmelt/Plots/chipps_plot.png", height=4, width=7, units="in")
```
# SLS & 20mm figure
```{r}
#data provided by Vanessa Mora (cc Jennifer OcegueraZavala), standardize column names before reading in

sls <- read.csv("LongfinSmelt/Data/SLS LFS Catch Data 2026.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
sls$SampleDate<-mdy(sls$SampleDate)
sls$Gear <- "SLS"

twentymm <- read.csv("LongfinSmelt/Data/20-mm LFS Catch Data 2026.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
twentymm$SampleDate<-mdy(twentymm$SampleDate)
twentymm$Gear <- "20-mm"

StationCatch <- twentymm %>% 
  group_by(WaterYear, Gear, SampleDate,Survey, Region, Station) %>% 
  summarize("Catch"= sum(Catch))

MaxTow <- twentymm %>% 
  group_by(SampleDate,Station) %>% 
  summarize("TowCount"= max(TowNum))

twentymm2 <- cbind(StationCatch,MaxTow[,3])
twentymm2$CPUE <- twentymm2$Catch/twentymm2$TowCount

#combine datasets (requires equal number of columns with matching names)
sls2 <- sls[c(1:4,7:9)] # removes start time and species columns
twentymm3 <-twentymm2[c(1:7)]
survey <- rbind(twentymm3,sls2)
head(survey$SampleDate, 20)

survey$my <- format(as.Date(survey$SampleDate, format="%Y/%m/%d"),"%m/%y")
survey <- survey %>% 
  filter(SampleDate <= as.Date("2026-06-16")) #only data through end of OMR management season (ended on June 16, between 20mm surveys 7 and 8)

#get total catch per region to inform text updates
year<-survey %>% 
  group_by(Region) %>% 
  summarize("Count"= sum(Catch))

#get total catch by month to inform text updates
totalm<-survey %>% 
  group_by(my) %>% 
  summarize("Count"= sum(Catch))

#plot by survey
#get monthly catch
month <-survey%>%
  group_by(Region, Gear, my) %>% 
  summarize("Count"= sum(Catch))

unique(month$my)
month$my<-factor(month$my, levels=c("12/25", "01/26", "02/26", "03/26","04/26","05/26", "06/26"))#force to recognize levels

#plot
ggplot(data=month, aes(x=my, y=Count, fill=Region)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position="dodge2",  colour="black") +
    facet_wrap(~Gear, ncol=1, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("Count of LFS") +
    xlab("Month") +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 14)) +
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 13)) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d()
    
ggsave("LongfinSmelt/Plots/CDFWcatch.png", height=8, width=8.5, units="in")
```
# SLS & 20mm CSD stations figure
```{r}
#survey plot-------------------------------
survey.csd <- filter(survey, Region == "Central & South Delta")
survey.csd$Station<-as.character(survey.csd$Station)
#create a new column for type and survey #
survey.csd$SurveyName <- paste(survey.csd$Gear, survey.csd$Survey, sep=" ")
survey.csd$SampleDate <- format(as.Date(survey.csd$SampleDate, format="%Y/%m/%d"),"%m/%d/%y")

#sum by station
csd.yoy<-survey.csd %>% 
  group_by(SampleDate, Gear, SurveyName, Station, Survey) %>% 
  summarize("Count"= sum(Catch))

csd.yoy$Detec <- ifelse(csd.yoy$Count>0, 1, 0)
unique(csd.yoy$Gear)
#sum stations with detection by survey
csd.yoy2<-csd.yoy %>% 
  group_by(Gear, SurveyName) %>% 
  summarize("detections"= sum(Detec))
yoy.csd <- filter(csd.yoy2, detections > 0.0000000)
unique(yoy.csd$SurveyName)
yoy.csd$SurveyName <- factor(yoy.csd$SurveyName, levels=c("SLS 2", "SLS 3", "SLS 4", "SLS 5",  "SLS 6", "20-mm 1", "20-mm 2", "20-mm 3"))
yoy.csd$Gear <- factor(yoy.csd$Gear, levels=c("SLS", "20-mm"))

#plot
cbbPalette <- c("#999999", "#E69F00")

su <- ggplot(data=yoy.csd, aes(x=SurveyName, y=detections, fill=Gear)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position="dodge2", width = 0.6, colour="black") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("Count of CSD stations with LFS detections") +
    xlab("") +
    labs(fill='Survey') +
    scale_fill_manual(values=cbbPalette) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))
su
surv <- su + geom_hline(yintercept=4, linetype="dashed", color = "black", linewidth = .8)
surv

#station plot------------------------------
#average by station
csd.catch<-survey.csd %>% 
  group_by(SurveyName, Gear, Station) %>% 
  summarize("Count"= mean(Catch)) #get mean catch at each station as SLS only does one tow and 20mm does 3 tows

#verify that all surveys had catch
catch <- filter(csd.catch, Count > 0.0000000)
unique(catch$SurveyName)

csd.catch$SurveyName <- factor(csd.catch$SurveyName, levels=c("SLS 2", "SLS 3", "SLS 4", "SLS 5",  "SLS 6", "20-mm 1", "20-mm 2", "20-mm 3"))

#see which stations had catch
unique(catch$Station)

#filter to just those surveys and stations with non-zero catch to make the plot easier to view
csd.catch2 <- filter(csd.catch, Station %in% c( "809","812" ,"815", "901", "906","914" ,"915", "919"))
csd.catch3 <- filter(csd.catch2, SurveyName %in% c("SLS 2", "SLS 3","SLS 4","SLS 5","SLS 6","20-mm 1", "20-mm 2", "20-mm 3"))

#plot catch by station
s <- ggplot(data=csd.catch3, aes(x=SurveyName, y=Count, fill=Station)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, preserve = "single"), colour="black") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("Average catch per tow of LFS (at CSD stations)") +
    xlab("Survey") +
    scale_fill_viridis_d() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))
s
stat <- s + geom_hline(yintercept=5, linetype="dashed", color = "black", size = .8)
stat

#combine----------------------------------

figure <- ggarrange(surv, stat,
                    labels = c("A)", "B)"), hjust = -2.5, vjust = 2.5,
                    ncol = 1, nrow = 2)
figure

ggsave("LongfinSmelt/Plots/survey_station_plot.png", height=8, width=7, units="in")
```

#QWest figure
```{r}
SJJ = cdec_query("SJJ", 20, start.date = ymd("2026-10-01"), end.date = ymd("2026-6-30"))
ggplot(SJJ, aes(x = ObsDate, y = Value)) + geom_line()
#rolling 7-day average
SJJave = SJJ %>%
  mutate(Date = date(ObsDate)) %>%
  group_by(Date) %>%
  summarize(Flow = mean(Value, na.rm =T)) %>%
  mutate(roll7 = rollmean(Flow, 7, fill = NA))
ggplot(SJJave, aes(x = Date, y = roll7))  +
  geom_line(aes(x = Date, y = roll7), color = "black", size=0.5)+
  theme_bw() +
  ylab("QWest (cfs)") +
  xlab("Date")
```

# LES figure
```{r}
#data provided by Morgan Gilbert/Tim Malinich

les <- read.csv("LongfinSmelt/Data/LES_LFS.csv", stringsAsFactors = F)
les$Date<-mdy(les$Date)
les$Year<-year(les$Date)
les$Month<-month(les$Date)
les$Study <- "LES"
les$SurveyName <- paste(les$Study, les$Survey, sep = " ")
les$CPUE <- les$TotalCatch/les$TowTotal
les$my <- format(as.Date(les$Date, format="%Y/%m/%d"),"%m/%y")
les$mo <- month.abb[les$Month]
view(les)

#filter to LFS collected during regular sampling for the desired year(s)
unique(les$SpecialStudy) #see what values there are so as to exclude them
les.lfs <- filter(les, CommonName=="LongfinSmelt", SpecialStudy=="", Year>2024)

#Some data inquiries for text updates as methods change annually
les.2025 <- filter(les.lfs, Year==2025)
les.2026 <- filter(les.lfs, Year==2026)
unique(les.2025$Station)
unique(les.2025$Month)
unique(les.2026$Station)
unique(les.2026$Month)

#get total survey (i.e. weekly) catch for data checks/text updates
monthly <-les.lfs %>% 
  group_by(Year, my, mo, SurveyName, Survey) %>% 
  summarize("SurveyCatch"= sum(TotalCatch))
write.csv(week, "LongfinSmelt/Data/WeeklyCatch.csv")
str(monthly$Survey)
monthly$Survey <- as.numeric(monthly$Survey)

#create monthly breaks for plotting
month_breaks <- monthly %>%
    group_by(Year, Month) %>%
    summarize(
        week = min(Survey),
        label = month.abb[first(Month)]) %>%
    ungroup()

#plot monthly catch per tow
ggplot(data=monthly, aes(x=Survey, y=SurveyCatch)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position="dodge2", colour="black") +
    facet_wrap(~Year, ncol=1, scales = "free_y") +
    theme_bw() +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = month_breaks$week,
        labels = month_breaks$label) +
    ylab("Count of Longfin Smelt") +
    xlab("Month") +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 14)) +
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 13))

ggsave("LongfinSmelt/Plots/2026lesplot.png", height=4, width=7, units="in")
```

#Annual Status report plots
```{r}
################8.4.2#####################
csd.catch4 <- filter(csd.catch, Station %in% c( "809", "812"))
csd.catch4$SurveyName <- factor(csd.catch4$SurveyName, levels=c("SLS 12", "SLS 13", "SLS 1", "SLS 2", "SLS 3", "SLS 4", "SLS 5",  "SLS 6", "20-mm 1", "20-mm 2", "20-mm 3", "20-mm 4", "20-mm 5", "20-mm 6", "20-mm 7", "20-mm 8"))

s <- ggplot(data=csd.catch4, aes(x=SurveyName, y=Count, fill=Station)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, preserve = "single"), colour="black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=50, linetype="dashed", color = "black", size = .8) +
    annotate("rect",
             xmin = 3.5,  
             xmax = 5.5, 
             ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
             alpha = 0.2, fill = "red") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("Avg LFS catch") +
    xlab("") +
    scale_fill_viridis_d() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

#plot seasonal salvage
salvageLFS <- read.csv("LongfinSmelt/Data/Total.Salvage_2026.csv",  stringsAsFactors = F)
salvageLFS$Date<-mdy(salvageLFS$DATE)

salvageLFS$State.Season.Salvage<-as.numeric(salvageLFS$State.Season.Salvage)
salvageLFS$Federal.Season.Salvage<-as.numeric(salvageLFS$Federal.Season.Salvage)

sal <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data=salvageLFS, aes(x=Date, y=State.Season.Salvage), color="blue", linewidth=1) +
    geom_line(data=salvageLFS, aes(x=Date, y=Federal.Season.Salvage), color="orange", linewidth=1, position=position_dodge(width=0.2)) +
   geom_text(
    data = salvage %>% slice_tail(n = 1),
    aes(x = as.Date("2026-06-01"), y = 140, label = "Federal Salvage"),
    color = "black")+
  geom_text(
    data = salvage %>% slice_tail(n = 1),
    aes(x = as.Date("2026-06-01"), y = 70, label = "State Salvage"),
    color = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2026-01-19"), color = "red", linewidth = 1) + #triggered on 12/16/25
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date("2026-01-28"), color = "red", linewidth = 1) + #triggered on 12/16/25
    annotate("rect",
             xmin = as.Date("2026-01-20"),
             xmax = as.Date("2026-01-26"),
             ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
             alpha = 0.2, fill = "orange") +
  annotate("rect",
             xmin = as.Date("2026-02-05"),
             xmax = as.Date("2026-03-07"),
             ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
             alpha = 0.2, fill = "grey") +
    theme_bw() +
    ylab("LFS Seasonal Salvage") +
    xlab("Date") +
    scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b") +
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12)) 

figure <- ggarrange(s, sal,
                    labels = c("A)", "B)"), hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
                    ncol = 1, nrow = 2)
figure

ggsave("LongfinSmelt/Plots/SurveySalvage.png", height=8, width=8.5, units="in")


```
